Relevant code evidence:

```rust
// clap_builder/src/parser/matches/arg_matches.rs:66-74
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct ArgMatches {
    #[cfg(debug_assertions)]
    pub(crate) valid_args: Vec<Id>,
    #[cfg(debug_assertions)]
    pub(crate) valid_subcommands: Vec<Str>,
    pub(crate) args: FlatMap<Id, MatchedArg>,
    pub(crate) subcommand: Option<Box<SubCommand>>,
}
```

```rust
// clap_builder/src/parser/arg_matcher.rs:16-20
#[derive(Debug, Default)]
pub(crate) struct ArgMatcher {
    matches: ArgMatches,
    pending: Option<PendingArg>,
}
```

```rust
// clap_builder/src/parser/parser.rs:1661-1667
#[derive(Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub(crate) struct PendingArg {
    pub(crate) id: Id,
    pub(crate) ident: Option<Identifier>,
    pub(crate) raw_vals: Vec<OsString>,
    pub(crate) trailing_idx: Option<usize>,
}
```

Supporting facts:
- `ArgMatches` already derives `Clone`.
- `ArgMatcher` does **not** derive `Clone`; it only derives `Debug, Default`.
- `ArgMatcher`’s fields are private to `arg_matcher.rs` (`matches`, `pending` have no `pub`/`pub(crate)`), but both field types shown here are clone-capable (`ArgMatches: Clone`, `PendingArg: Clone`).
